title: JeeJaan® 3 Rolls of Silver Duct Tape 50mm x 50m Heavy Duty Waterproof Gaffa Tape for Electrical Plumbing Use Strong Adhesive Durable Ideal for Sealing Fixing and Wrapping Projects
features: ✅ JEEJAAN SILVER DUCT TAPE: Our 3 Pcs heavy-duty JeeJaan Gaffer tape (50mm x 50m) is waterproof with strong adhesive material. Industry-standard, used in film, photography, and ads. Weather, water, and UV resistant, ideal for indoor/outdoor use, patching, sealing, and bundling.

✅ STRONG ADHESION FOR DIVERSE SURFACES: Instantly grips glass, vinyl, and plastic. It is ideal for smooth, rough, and uneven surfaces, providing reliable sealing. Firmly sticks to wood, metal, leather, and laminate, ensuring strong adhesion for home, garage, and garden repairs.

✅ EASY AND CLEAN REMOVAL: Can be torn by hand in both directions. Leaves no residue, keeping surfaces undamaged. Waterproof backing suitable for temporary fixes on leaking pipes and outdoor tasks, ensuring durability in wet conditions.

✅ VERSATILE MULTI-PURPOSE USE: Ideal for home, school, office, and warehouse. Perfect for packing, labelling, and organizing cables, and crafts. Effectively removes lint and dust from woollen coats and car interiors, offering creative solutions beyond traditional uses.

✅ CUSTOMER SATISFACTION: Ensuring your satisfaction is our priority. Our Gaffa tape retains its stickiness and strength, preserving a clean look. Its heavy-duty durability guarantees secure sealing, protecting your items effectively.
description: Product Description JeeJaan Heavy Duty Silver Duct Tape 50mm x 50m JeeJaan Silver Duct Tape is a high-performance, heavy-duty tape designed for tough jobs. Whether you need to secure, repair, bundle, or seal, our duct tape offers superior adhesion and durability. Made with premium-quality materials, allowing it to conform to various surfaces for long-lasting performance. Its waterproof and weather-resistant properties make it ideal for indoor and outdoor use. With a strong adhesive backing & tear-resistant construction, JeeJaan Silver Duct Tape provides a powerful bond on surfaces like wood, plastic, metal, and fabric. It’s a must-have for DIY projects, industrial applications, & everyday fixes. Whether you’re a professional or a homeowner, our duct tape delivers exceptional performance. Specs Colour: Silver Thickness: 70 Micron Size: 50mm x 50m Material: Plastic Features: Heavy-Duty Adhesion This Silver duct tape features a high-tack adhesive that sticks instantly to wood, metal, plastic, glass, concrete, fabric, rubber, and more. It holds firm under pressure and tension, ensuring long-lasting adhesion in both indoor and outdoor environments. Tear-Resistant, Yet Easy to Use Unlike flimsy duct tapes, JeeJaan Silver Duct Tape is made with thick, tear-resistant fabric that won’t rip easily under stress. However, it's still hand-tearable, allowing you to cut the tape without using tools—perfect for quick and efficient application. Multipurpose & Versatile for Any Job From industrial repairs to crafting and DIY projects, this tape is a must-have for professionals and homeowners alike. It can be used for sealing, bundling, reinforcing, insulating, crafting, and emergency repairs, making it one of the most versatile tapes available. Residue-Free & Easy to Remove While this tape offers exceptional grip, it also removes cleanly without leaving behind a sticky residue, making it ideal for temporary fixes, stage setups, and event decorations where a clean surface is required after removal. Usage: Reliable for Household & DIY Repairs Use it for fixing broken items, sealing leaks, reinforcing furniture, or bundling wires and cables. Whether you’re patching up torn upholstery, reinforcing chair legs, or fixing loose floorboards, this tape provides a quick, reliable fix. Perfect for Outdoor, Camping & Emergency Use When you’re outdoors, this tape is a lifesaver. Use it to repair tents, secure camping gear, fix hiking equipment, and waterproof objects. It's also great for quick auto repairs, such as securing loose bumpers, patching hoses, or temporarily fixing cracked headlights. Reliable for Packaging & Shipping Need extra-strong tape for shipping boxes and parcels? This tape provides an extra layer of security for heavy packages, ensuring that your shipments remain intact during transit. Creative DIY & Crafting Projects Crafters and artists love this sleek Silver tape for creative projects, labeling, and decor. Whether you’re making custom furniture, creating a backdrop, or working on a school project, this tape adds both function and style to your work. Why Choose JeeJaan Silver Duct Tape? JeeJaan Silver Duct Tape is crafted for maximum strength, durability, and versatility, making it the perfect solution for professional and everyday use. Whether you're tackling heavy-duty repairs, outdoor fixes, or creative projects, its strong adhesive and tear-resistant material ensure a secure hold on wood, metal, plastic, fabric, and more. Designed to withstand extreme weather conditions, it remains reliable in rain, heat, and cold, making it an essential tool for both indoor and outdoor applications. Unlike standard duct tapes, JeeJaan Silver Duct Tape offers a clean, matte Silver finish that blends seamlessly into various surfaces, providing a sleek, professional look. It sticks firmly when needed but removes cleanly without leaving residue, making it ideal for temporary fixes, event setups, and stage productions. Whether you're a contractor, DIY enthusiast, or simply need a strong tape for everyday tasks, JeeJaan ensures exceptional performance and reliability in every roll.
